content:
O ṣeun fun atunṣe rẹ. Fun iṣiro itọka iṣọkan itusilẹ (Release Consistency Index, RCI) laifọwọyi gẹgẹ bi ISO 34271, irinṣẹ ti a mọ lati ṣe atilẹyin eyi ni:

- **Rational Quality Manager (RQM)** lati IBM: O ni agbara lati ṣe atẹle ati ṣe iṣiro awọn metiriki didara pẹlu atilẹyin fun awọn itọka boṣewa, pẹlu RCI.

- **SonarQube** pẹlu awọn afikun to yẹ: O le ṣe iṣiro awọn metiriki koodu ati ilana itusilẹ, ti o le ṣe atunṣe lati ṣe iṣiro RCI laifọwọyi.

Ni gbogbogbo, awọn irinṣẹ CI/CD bii Jenkins, GitLab CI, tabi Azure DevOps le ṣe iṣiro RCI ti a ba ṣeto awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe (jobs) ati awọn
